# Whaddon Garage — AI SEO Summary

## Business
- **Name**: Whaddon Garage
- **Owners**: Garry and Colleen Summers
- **Type**: Independent family-run automotive garage
- **Location**: Stroud Road, Whaddon, Gloucester GL4 0UG, United Kingdom
- **Phone**: 01452 813384
- **Recovery Mobile**: 07801 060549
- **Email**: whaddongarage@btconnect.com
- **Website**: https://whaddongarage.getdigitaldone.co.uk

## Hours
- Monday–Friday: 08:30–17:30
- Saturday: 09:00–13:00
- Sunday: Closed

## About
Whaddon Garage is an independent, family-owned garage with over 40 years of experience serving Gloucester, Stroud, Cheltenham and the wider Gloucestershire area. All work is guaranteed for 12 months. Staff hold NVQ3 qualifications and have 15–20 years of hands-on experience. Free courtesy cars and vans are available to keep customers mobile (book in advance, fuel only charge).

## Services
- **MOT Testing**: Class 4 DVSA-approved station, vehicles up to 3 tons, £50, free re-test within 10 working days
- **Car Servicing**: Interim and full annual service for all makes, oil changes, cam belts, brake inspections
- **Car Repairs**: Brakes, steering, suspension, transmission, engine rebuilds, body work and panel beating, MIG welding to MOT standard
- **Engine Diagnostics**: FREE diagnostic code read (engine management, ABS, airbags) — competitors charge £40
- **ECU Remapping**: Up to 20% fuel economy improvement or performance gains, vehicles from 2000 onwards
- **Tyres**: MAXXIS tyre specialist, fitting, balancing, tracking
- **Exhausts**: Full exhaust systems, CAT converters, pipes and boxes for all makes
- **Breakdown Recovery**: Local and long-distance vehicle recovery, call 07801 060549

## Coverage Area
Gloucester, Stroud, Cheltenham, Barnwood, Abbeymead, Upton St Leonards, Brockworth, Cranham, Painswick, Slad, Edge, Harescombe, Haresfield, Ebley, Stonehouse, Nupend, Whitminster, Frampton on Severn, Standish, Hardwicke, Putloe, Saul, Longney, Quedgeley, Tuffley, Elmore, Moreton Valence, Gloucestershire

## Key Selling Points
- 40+ years in the automotive industry
- 12-month guarantee on all work
- Free diagnostic code read (saves customers £40 vs competitors)
- Free courtesy cars/vans during repairs
- No charge for MOT re-test within 10 working days
- Independent — personal attention, not a faceless chain
- Specialist equipment: cam/timing belt system, MIG welding, advanced diagnostics
